name: Select
import: import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem } from '@/components/ui/select'
description: M3 dropdown menu built on Radix. Trigger matches M3 text field height (56px) with rounded-xs corners. Menu uses rounded-xs with surface-container background.
example:
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger className="h-14 rounded-xs border-outline">
    <SelectValue placeholder="Select option" />
  </SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent className="rounded-xs bg-surface-container">
    <SelectItem value="a">Option A</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="b">Option B</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
never: Never use raw <select> -- always use Select from Radix
Never hardcode dropdown colors -- use surface-container tokens
Never use box shadows on dropdown -- use tonal elevation
